name: Antivirus Software
description: Protect your devices from malware, ransomware, and cyber threats with the best antivirus software of 2026.
longDescription: We installed and tested 20+ antivirus solutions over 6 months to identify the 10 best options for every need and budget. Our testing included malware detection benchmarks using both known and zero-day threats, system performance impact measurements, phishing protection tests, and usability evaluations across Windows, Mac, Android, and iOS.
buyingGuideIntro: Choosing the right antivirus requires balancing protection strength against system performance impact. Our testing evaluates every product across detection rates, system resource usage, and extra features.
testingCriteria: Malware Detection — We test against 100,000+ malware samples including viruses, ransomware, trojans, and zero-day threats
System Performance — We measure CPU, memory, and disk usage during full scans and real-time protection
Phishing Protection — We test against 1,000+ phishing URLs to evaluate web protection accuracy
Features & Extras — We evaluate VPN, password manager, parental controls, and dark web monitoring add-ons
Value for Money — We compare protection quality against subscription pricing and device coverage

seoMeta.title: 10 Best Antivirus Software of 2026 — Expert Reviews & Rankings | TrueTopReviews
seoMeta.description: We tested 20+ antivirus solutions to find the 10 best. Compare malware protection, system performance, and pricing. Expert reviews updated June 2026.
